prompt_en: He yanked the pull cord hard, leaning his body backward to add force — first came the "click clack" of a few empty rotations, the engine coughed and struggled, then finally with a "Boom!" the old machine roared to life, its vibrations traveling from the floor up through your feet.
prompt_vision: A person yanking a pull cord on an old machine, leaning backward with effort, as the machine begins to vibrate and operate.
